phases.name: Poison Aura
phases.text:
ONGOING
(Place to the side, do not re-shuffle into the deck)
All Hunters ending their turn in the Blood-Starved Beast's space suffer Poison. While in its space, Poisoned Hunter's Attacks and Dodges suffer -1 {slow}.
Flip another Boss Action.
